name: [Data Sets]
desc: Selected data sets will be included in WeatherKit requests.

name: [Weather] Replacement Scope

items.label: Mainland China, Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan

desc: Replace weather data only for matching regions.

name: [Weather] Data Source
desc: Use the selected provider to replace weather data.

name: [Next-Hour Precipitation Intensity] Data Source
desc: Use the selected provider to replace or fill next-hour precipitation intensity data.

name: [Current Pollutants] Data Source
desc: Use the selected provider to fill pollutant data. IQAir free plans usually return AQI only; pollutant concentrations require a matching API plan.

name: [Current Pollutants - Unit Conversion] Targets
desc: Convert pollutant units for comparison with air-quality standards. Unit conversion can introduce decimals, minor precision loss, and omitted decimal parts.

name: [Current Pollutants - Unit Conversion] Mode

items.label: Convert to ug/m3 unless the standard requires another unit
Convert to EU ppb unless the standard requires another unit
Convert to US ppb unless the standard requires another unit

desc: Target unit conversion mode for pollutants.

name: [Current AQI] Replacement Targets
desc: Replace air-quality indexes for the selected standards.

name: [Current AQI] Data Source
desc: Use the selected provider to fill and replace AQI data.

name: [Current AQI] Force Primary Pollutant
desc: Ignore the HJ 633-2012 AQI > 50 rule and always use the pollutant with the highest IAQI as the primary pollutant.

name: [Air Quality - Yesterday Comparison] Replace on Current Change
desc: Replace yesterday comparison data when today's AQI changes, even if comparison data already exists.

name: [Yesterday Pollutants] Data Source
desc: Provide pollutant data for the iRingo built-in algorithm to calculate yesterday's AQI.

name: [Yesterday AQI] Data Source
desc: Data source used to compare with today's AQI.

name: [iRingo Built-in Algorithm] Algorithm
desc: Use the built-in algorithm to calculate AQI locally from pollutant data. InstantCast is based on WAQI, and the US version uses WAQI's ozone standard.

name: [iRingo Built-in Algorithm] Allow Over-Range Index
desc: Allow US and China AQI indexes to exceed 500. When the value exceeds 500, the small indicator color dot may disappear.

name: [API] OpenWeather Request URL
desc: OpenWeather One Call API 4.0 request URL

name: [API] OpenWeather Token
desc: OpenWeather API token

name: [API] QWeather Host
desc: Hostname used by the QWeather API

name: [API] QWeather Token
desc: QWeather API token

name: [API] WAQI Token
desc: WAQI API token. Filling this field automatically enables the WAQI advanced API.

name: [API] IQAir Request URL
desc: IQAir AirVisual API request URL

name: [API] IQAir Token
desc: IQAir AirVisual API token

name: [Storage] Configuration Type

items.label: Prefer configuration passed by $argument, such as plugin options and module arguments. Missing $argument values are provided by PersistentStore (BoxJs).
Only use configuration from $persistentStore, such as BoxJs.
Only use defaults from the author's database.mjs file. Other custom configuration will no longer take effect.

desc: Choose the configuration source. For legacy setups without this option, the order remains $persistentStore (BoxJs) > $argument > database.

name: [Debug] Log Level
desc: Choose the script log level. Logs below the selected level will be suppressed.
